entities.name: TECHNOLOGY DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The process of creating agricultural solutions based on scientific knowledge and stakeholder needs

entities.name: SCIENTIFIC KNOWLEDGE
entities.description: The theoretical and empirical basis used to develop new agricultural technologies

entities.name: FARMERS
entities.description: The primary client group and participants in on-farm research and technology adoption

entities.name: INTENSIVE AGRICULTURE
entities.description: A farming method focused on increasing total production through high inputs

entities.name: INDIGENOUS TECHNOLOGY
entities.description: Local, traditional knowledge used to complement scientific agricultural developments

entities.name: SUSTAINABILITY OF NATURAL RESOURCES
entities.description: The goal of maintaining ecological balance while developing technology

entities.name: ENVIRONMENTAL CONCERNS
entities.description: External ecological factors that influence the development of agricultural technology

entities.name: TECHNOLOGY TRANSFER
entities.description: The process of adapting and adopting new technologies by client groups

entities.name: RESEARCH AND EXTENSION INFRASTRUCTURE
entities.description: The organizational framework required for successful technology transfer

entities.name: CONGENIAL POLICIES
entities.description: Supportive government or institutional policies that facilitate technology adoption

entities.name: MARKET FOR COMMODITIES
entities.description: The economic environment required for the success of new agricultural technologies

entities.name: AGRO-SOCIOECONOMIC CONDITIONS
entities.description: The combined agricultural and social factors that influence technology suitability

entities.name: ON-FARM RESEARCH TRIALS
entities.description: A method of conducting research directly on farms to identify production constraints

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: The International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-Arid Tropics, involved in technology transfer

entities.name: LEGUMES
entities.description: A group of crops that are the focus of the LEGOFTEN and AGLOR programs

entities.name: LEGOFTEN
entities.description: Legumes On-farm Testing and Nurseries, a program for technology transfer in legumes

entities.name: AGLOR
entities.description: Asian Grain Legumes On-farm Research, a program for technology transfer in Asian grain legumes
